cq_before.score: structural split target; blocking CQ gates passed post-split
notes: Target is 1863 LOC and combines PHP/Yii namespace resolution, ActiveRecord analysis, event tracing, view mapping, service resolution, security scanning, N+1 detection, god model detection, and project audit orchestration.
Public callers import src/tools/php-tools.js; the split must preserve this facade and every public export.
Registered standalone PHP/Yii catalog entries are 6, but the implementation file exposes 9 public tool functions used by tests and the php_project_audit composite.

plan.summary: Split PHP/Yii tool implementations into per-tool modules while keeping src/tools/php-tools.ts as the compatibility facade.

test_audit_before.added_characterization: Facade runtime re-export identity plus type-level equality for every public type re-export from the per-tool modules.

prove.blind_audit: clean:strict: blind-audit-codex over src/tools/php-tools.ts + tests/tools/php-tools.test.ts reported CLEAN after adding type-level facade assertions; inventory 26/26 FULL.
prove.findings_disposition: Adversarial findings are algorithmic behavior gaps pre-existing in the moved implementations. They are preserved for the pure split commit; warning-level bugs will be fixed in a separate follow-up commit in this same run. Info-level ActiveRecord Model classification is documented but not changed without product semantics confirmation.
